title: Include Groups in "Me (Dynamic)" filter
excerpt: Currently you can add the “Me (dynamic)” filter to only show items tat I am assigned to.  It would be great to include groups that I am a part of as well. We currently have to assign each individual person in our departm…

posts.author: Bobby.Trick (Bobby Trick)
posts.cookedHtml: Currently you can add the “Me (dynamic)” filter to only show items tat I am assigned to. It would be great to include groups that I am a part of as well. We currently have to assign each individual person in our department because the groups we are a part of do not penetrate the dynamic filter.

posts.author: Bobby.Trick (Bobby Trick)
posts.cookedHtml: Maybe the filter could just be “My Groups (Dynamic)”. My team has been talking about this an think it really would be a beneficial addition.

posts.author: Sarahwellenbrock (Sarah Wellenbrock)
posts.cookedHtml: This would be an excellent addition as it is something we are facing as well. Especially on the “my work” feature it won’t show if you are in a group. I’ve created a “my work” on a particular board as well and it won’t show their either.

posts.author: Matt_Frost (Dr Matt Frost - www.frostgroup.uk)
posts.cookedHtml: This would be a really helpful feature!!
